archetype: Archetype 2 (Performance Pro) adapted for Premium Fintech

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-semibold

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing philosophy. p-6 or p-8 for standard cards, p-12 to p-24 for marketing sections.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Mode B: Control Room Grid. Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. gap-6. Dense but clear.
spacing_and_layout.landing_grid: Mode A: Tetris Grid for features and showcases. Asymmetrical bento boxes with gap-8.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: Cards must have p-6 or p-8. No content touches the border.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-align data and typography. Center-align only for hero headlines.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Glassmorphism (The Crystal Variant). bg-[#0A0A0A]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]. Inner stroke mandatory.
surface_strategies.header: Sticky Glass. backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#050505]/70 border-b border-white/10. z-50.
surface_strategies.sidebar: Solid Obsidian bg-[#050505] with right border border-white/10. Active item gets bg-white/5 and left border 2px primary.
surface_strategies.buttons: Flat solid primary color for CTAs. Glassy for secondary (bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10).

components.charts: Recharts. Use Monospace font for axes. Tooltip must be Glassmorphism. Colors: Volt Blue for line, Emerald/Blaze for candles. Remove background grid or use extremely faint white/5.
components.gauges: Use SVG-based half-circle gauges for Trend and Confidence. Glow effects (drop-shadow) on the needle/active path.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. border-collapse. Row hover is bg-white/5. Data cells must use monospace font for alignment.
components.inputs: Shadcn Input. bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary. Monospace placeholder for tickers.
components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs. Custom h-auto. Active tab gets bg-white/10 text-white, inactive gets text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300.

animation_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements transition-all duration-200 ease-out.
animation_motion.page_load: Framer Motion staggered fade-up for dashboard widgets and landing page sections.
animation_motion.loading: Use monospace ASCII loaders or subtle pulsing logos. No generic spinners.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight. Size 20px or 24px.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark tech background for Landing Page Hero section. Use with heavy black overlay (bg-black/60).

showcase_chart.description: Stock market candlestick chart on dark screen. Use in Project Showcase page as a feature image.

dynamic_abstract.description: Dynamic neon abstract. Use for the AI prediction engine banner or empty states in the dashboard.

critical_rules: Follow ALL color codes strictly. Do NOT use Tailwind default slate/gray for backgrounds. Use #050505 and custom RGBA surfaces.
Implement fonts properly via Google Fonts or standard imports in index.html/CSS.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Clash Display' or a solid Serif/Grotesk. If unavailable, fallback to 'Space Grotesk' but 'Clash Display' via CDN is preferred.
Ensure all numeric data (prices, percentages, tickers) uses the monospace font.
In Dashboard, never center text unless explicitly a standalone empty state.
Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, inputs, and interactive charts.
Use Lucide React if Phosphor is not strictly required, but Phosphor is highly recommended for the premium look.

page_specifics.landing_page: High visual impact. Use the hero_background with an overlay. Big typography. Asymmetrical bento grid for features.
page_specifics.dashboard: Control Room Grid. Strict hierarchy. Real-time data cards at top, main chart spanning 2-3 columns, AI side panel spanning 1 column.
page_specifics.project_showcase: Editorial style. Wide images (use showcase_chart), generous vertical rhythm, clear explanations of MAE/RMSE.
page_specifics.documentation: Swiss-style high contrast dark mode. Left sidebar nav, right content area. Highly legible text, lots of code blocks or data tables.
